calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Yoselin Valiente, Adonis Valiente and Aldo Del Cid.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Rocia Lopez, CSR #11194. Email: rlopez@sftc.net.

Daniel R. Stern, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Parkmerced Owner, LLC.
Elizabeth Kershaw, Director of Legal Affairs for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Yoselin Valiente, Adonis Valiente or Aldo Del Cid.

Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on September 20, 2019.
Defendants' answer was filed October 1, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on October 21, 2019, setting trial for today, November 4, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed today, November 4, 2019.

Plaintiff submitted the following exhibit for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement signed 5/12/19.............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against defendants Yoselin Valiente, an individual, Adonis Valiente, an individual and Aldo Del Cid, an individual, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $3,354,00.
Holdover Damages - $3,801.20.
Costs - $500.00.
Total - $7,655.20.

Additionally, plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 208 Gonzalez Drive, San Francisco, CA 94132.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.
